TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Ciataw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 868 buwan, 2,284 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 264 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,020 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciataw hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciataw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciataw hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Ciataw hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Ciataw hya' ga Cicala'ay. tay mkyahu' na Ciataw hya' ga Kalokapuk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciataw ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®iataw …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ikekami …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, pajwan *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ńßualien. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a kalokapuk. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ¶~ ®iataw …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Ciataw ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Ikekami go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 868 buwan, 2,284 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 264 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 2,020 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 9%, Bunun 1%, Paywan 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Ciataw hya' ga wsilung krahu'. tay 'zil na Ciataw hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Ciataw hya' ga Ku'ang sang go. tay mkraya' na Ciataw hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Ciataw hya' ga Cicala'ay. tay mkyahu' na Ciataw hya' ga Kalokapuk. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Ciataw ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo maki 1 hasisyo. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč ¶~ ®iataw …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu ikekami …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a *** ő≤uwan, *,*** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *,*** ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē *%, ő≤unun *%, pajwan *%. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ws~…ēiluŇč krańßu Ē. taj Ēzil na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax krańßu Ē. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ku ĒaŇč s~…ēaŇč …£o. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ńßualien. taj mkraja Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®i ¶~ ®ala Ēaj. taj mkjańßu Ē na ¶~ ®iataw ńßja Ē …£a kalokapuk. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč ¶~ ®iataw …£a uŇčat kjokaj. ńßas~…ēis~…ējo maki * ńßas~…ēis~…ējo. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj maki * pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj. tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
